author: thisisshi
text: aws.ecs - related filter for services, tasks, container instances

author: thisisshi
text:
Add a related filter to filter on metadata on the cluster for services, tasks, etc.

```
policies:
  - name: ecs-service-query-with-cluster-tags
    resource: ecs-service
    filters:
        - type: ecs-cluster
          key: tag:Application
          value: Application1
```
